text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I stop by the basement floor of a
department store to find it buzzing with people
buying Valentine's chocolates.
choice_data_list: (Maybe I should I get something for Air Shakur.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She selects her food solely based on its
nutritional value and only rarely indulges in any
sort of treat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she chews on a lot of glucose tablets, and I
occasionally see her eating chocolate. I think she
likes snapping the bars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are so many varieties to choose from. After
some thought, I buy something I think she'll like.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: There you are, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I made some chocolate for the class. Be sure to
try some later!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm good.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm afraid you don't have a choice. I'm giving
you chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And you're going to try it. I'll drop some off at
your room later!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
Look here...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So you'll try some? Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Passive-aggressive much?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Some people say thank you in advance as a tactic
to make it difficult for the other person to refuse.
I believe it's called pre-framing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, no, no! I didn't mean it like that!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's... I just wanted to say thanks for letting me
give them to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(The hell? First of all, what is it like to want to
give someone something?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Happy Valentine's, Shakur! Could I interest you in
some delicious chocolate? Free of charge, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Ordinarily, people expect to get something out of it. Like Tachyon. Now, her I can understand.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Well, whatever. No point wastin' time thinkin'
about it. I'll get started on compiling the spring
Tenno Sho data.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Where are you going? These chocolates that
expand your senses are reaaally great.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is seriously tapping away at her
computer, but it shouldn't be long before she
starts to crave glucose.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush to get the chocolates I bought yesterday. I
chose some with the same nutritional value as her
usual ones so as not to throw off her calculated
diet.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bought semi-sweet chocolates loaded with
cacao and firm enough to be satisfying to bite
into. I'm hoping it gives her a boost.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm goin' back to my dorm.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I felt like today's chocolates were better than
usual for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uh... sure?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well? Don't just sit there smirking. Tell me the
brand already! Read between the lines.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Were those Valentine's chocolates? ...Knowin'
this joker, it's likely.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Every single person is so smug and self-satisfied...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. What a headache.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whatever. I'm outta here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(That chocolate today was really good. I usually
don't even think about them...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(It wonder if it's because it's Valentine's Day. The
package was just left sitting there.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(A normal person would've said something. What
a weak way of goin' about it.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's... I just wanted to say thanks for letting me
give them to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't get it. Just everyone sittin' around
being smug.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wait until ya see the results before you start
pattin' yourselves on the back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I messaged you yesterday, but I'm changin'
today's regimen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I came up with a new approach that looks more
efficient when I was running some calculations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, but it felt like I had a little extra zip of
energy yesterday. Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's acting rough again, but I get the sense...
training today is gonna go pretty well.
